title: Manta Ballet
caption: Dozens of reef mantas barrel-feeding in the shallows on an incoming tide.

title: Gentle Giant
caption: A whale shark cruising the drop-off, dwarfing the divers alongside.

title: Lazy Current
caption: A green turtle resting on the reef wall as the current eases.

title: Winter Pod
caption: Orcas herding herring under the Arctic dark — shot in 2°C water.

title: Song of Vava'u
caption: A humpback calf circling, curious, while its mother rests below.

title: Play
caption: A young sea lion looping through the lens, showing off.

title: The Approach
caption: A great white rising out of the green, calm and deliberate.

title: Beak Full
caption: A puffin landing with a beak crammed full of sand eels.

title: The Colony
caption: Bass Rock white with gannets — the world's largest northern colony.

title: The Wall of Sharks
caption: Hundreds of grey reef sharks holding in the pass at dusk.

title: Sand Dancers
caption: Atlantic spotted dolphins playing over white sand at golden hour.

title: Ice Edge
caption: A walrus hauled out on drifting ice, far north of the mainland.
